source: TIS 24-2548 (มอก. เหล็กข้ออ้อยและเหล็กเส้นกลม) · cross-check มงคล Table A.2
unit: cm and cm² · Thai construction standard

sizes.name: DB10
sizes.notes: smallest standard deformed bar · used for small beams · stirrups in some designs

sizes.name: DB16
sizes.notes: most common for residential beam main bars

sizes.name: DB20
sizes.notes: common for commercial beam main bars

sizes.name: DB28
sizes.notes: very heavy beam · special construction · check supplier availability

stirrup_sizes.name: RB9
stirrup_sizes.notes: common stirrup size for typical beams

stirrup_sizes.name: DB10
stirrup_sizes.notes: deformed stirrup · heavier beams · better anchorage

spacing_rules.min_clear_spacing_note: per ACI 25.2.1 / ว.ส.ท. · min clear between parallel bars in single layer
spacing_rules.max_bars_per_layer_note: more than 6 main bars in one layer = production difficulty · use multi-layer instead

grade_compatibility.note: SD40/SD50 (deformed · high-yield) standard for main bars · SR24/SD30 for stirrups (smaller diameter · ductility for bending around bars)
